ignoreDead.name: Ignore Special Cases
ignoreDead.hint: Dead or incapacitated tokens will not be snapped.

ignoreMisaligned.name: Ignore Misaligned Tokens
ignoreMisaligned.hint: Tokens that are deliberately placed off-grid will not be snapped.

ignoreElevation.name: Ignore Token Elevation
ignoreElevation.hint: Tokens at different elevations can collide and scatter together.

scatter.name: Scattering
scatter.hint: How much the tokens will scatter around?

hideBtn.name: Hide Button
hideBtn.hint: Whether to hide the size snap button from the token controls. (Requires Reload)

playersBtn.name: Show Button to Players
playersBtn.hint: Whether to show the size snap button to players. (Requires Reload)
